glosses.it: spuntino di metà mattina; pausa di metà mattina

glosses.yue: 朝早小食; 上午茶點
glosses.pt: lanche da manhã; pausa da manhã
glosses.vi: bữa ăn nhẹ buổi sáng; giờ nghỉ buổi sáng
glosses.hi: सुबह का हल्का नाश्ता; सुबह का विराम
glosses.ro: gustare de dimineață; pauză de dimineață

sentences.target: Ich nehme das Znüni mit ins Büro.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈneːmə das ˈtsnyːni mɪt ɪns byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Ich nehme das Znüni mit ins Büro.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈneːmə das ˈtsnyːni mɪt ɪns byˈʁoː/
translations.en: I’m taking the mid-morning snack to the office.
translations.es: Llevo el tentempié de media mañana a la oficina.
translations.fr: J’emporte la collation du matin au bureau.
translations.it: Porto lo spuntino di metà mattina in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把上午点心带到办公室。
translations.yue: 我帶上午小食去辦公室。
translations.ru: Я беру второй завтрак с собой в офис.
translations.pt: Estou levando o lanche da manhã para o escritório.
translations.he: אני לוקח את ארוחת העשר למשרד.
translations.vi: Tôi mang bữa lót dạ buổi sáng đến văn phòng.
translations.ar: أحمل الوجبة الخفيفة الصباحية إلى المكتب.
translations.nl: Ik neem het tienuurtje mee naar kantoor.
translations.uk: Я беру другий сніданок до офісу.
translations.hi: मैं मध्य सुबह का नाश्ता दफ्तर ले जा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Παίρνω το δεκατιανό μαζί μου στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Jeg tar formiddagsmaten med til kontoret.
translations.id: Saya membawa kudapan pagi ke kantor.
translations.sv: Jag tar med förmiddagsfika till kontoret.
translations.ro: Duc gustarea de dimineață la birou.
translations.da: Jeg tager formiddagsmad med på kontoret.
translations.ja: オフィスに午前のおやつを持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the sentence.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present of the separable verb 'mitnehmen' (to take along); main predicate.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular, determiner of 'Znüni'.
Swiss German noun meaning 'mid-morning snack', neuter; direct object (accusative) of 'nehme'.
Separable particle belonging to 'mitnehmen', placed at the clause-final position.
Contraction of 'in' + 'das'; preposition marking direction (accusative) toward 'Büro'.
Noun, destination of motion with 'ins'; accusative case (governed by directional 'in').

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns zum Znüni beim Bäcker.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns tsʊm ˈtsnyːni baɪ̯m ˈbɛkɐ/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns zum Znüni beim Bäcker.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns tsʊm ˈtsnyːni baɪ̯m ˈbɛkɐ/
translations.en: We’re meeting for a mid-morning snack at the bakery.
translations.es: Quedamos para un tentempié de media mañana en la panadería.
translations.fr: On se retrouve pour une collation du matin à la boulangerie.
translations.it: Ci vediamo per uno spuntino di metà mattina in panetteria.
translations.ko: 우리는 빵집에서 오전 간식을 먹으려고 만나요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在面包店见面吃个上午点心。
translations.yue: 我哋喺餅店見面食個上午小食。
translations.ru: Мы встречаемся на второй завтрак в пекарне.
translations.pt: Vamos nos encontrar para um lanche da manhã na padaria.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi hẹn nhau ăn bữa lót dạ buổi sáng ở tiệm bánh.
translations.ar: نلتقي لتناول وجبة خفيفة صباحية في المخبز.
translations.nl: We spreken af voor een tienuurtje bij de bakker.
translations.uk: Ми зустрічаємося на другий сніданок у пекарні.
translations.hi: हम बेकरी में मध्य सुबह के नाश्ते के लिए मिल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się na drugie śniadanie w piekarni.
translations.nb: Vi møtes for formiddagsmat på bakeriet.
translations.id: Kami bertemu untuk makan kudapan pagi di toko roti.
translations.sv: Vi ses för en förmiddagsfika på bageriet.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim pentru o gustare de dimineață la brutărie.
translations.cs: Sejdeme se na dopolední svačinu v pekárně.
translations.da: Vi mødes til formiddagsmad hos bageren.
translations.ja: パン屋で午前のおやつを一緒に食べます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; main predicate.
Reflexive/reciprocal pronoun, 1st person plural accusative; object of 'treffen' expressing mutual action.
Contraction of 'zu' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative; here in the set phrase 'zum Znüni' (for a snack).
Noun in dative singular governed by 'zu'; denotes the occasion/purpose ('for a mid-morning snack').
Contraction of 'bei' + 'dem'; preposition governing dative; marks location.
Noun, masculine dative singular as object of 'bei'; denotes the place ('at the baker's').

sentences.target: Sie packt das Znüni für die Kinder.
sentences.reading: /ziː pakt das ˈtsnyːni fyːɐ diː ˈkɪndɐ/

translations.de: Sie packt das Znüni für die Kinder.
translations.ipa: /ziː pakt das ˈtsnyːni fyːɐ diː ˈkɪndɐ/
translations.en: She packs the mid-morning snack for the children.
translations.es: Ella prepara el tentempié de media mañana para los niños.
translations.fr: Elle prépare la collation du matin pour les enfants.
translations.it: Lei prepara lo spuntino di metà mattina per i bambini.
translations.ko: 그녀는 아이들을 위해 오전 간식을 싸요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她给孩子们准备上午点心。
translations.yue: 佢幫小朋友準備上午小食。
translations.ru: Она собирает второй завтрак для детей.
translations.pt: Ela prepara o lanche da manhã para as crianças.
translations.he: היא אורזת את ארוחת העשר לילדים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy chuẩn bị bữa lót dạ buổi sáng cho bọn trẻ.
translations.ar: هي تحضّر الوجبة الخفيفة الصباحية للأطفال.
translations.nl: Zij pakt het tienuurtje voor de kinderen in.
translations.uk: Вона пакує другий сніданок для дітей.
translations.hu: Ő csomagolja a tízórait a gyerekeknek.
translations.hi: वह बच्चों के लिए मध्य सुबह का नाश्ता पैक कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona pakuje drugie śniadanie dla dzieci.
translations.el: Ετοιμάζει το δεκατιανό για τα παιδιά.
translations.id: Dia menyiapkan kudapan pagi untuk anak-anak.
translations.ro: Ea împachetează gustarea de dimineață pentru copii.
translations.ja: 彼女は子どもたちの午前のおやつを用意します。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject (agreement with 'packt').
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; main predicate.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular, determiner of 'Znüni'.
Neuter noun; direct object (accusative) of 'packt'.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a beneficiary phrase.
Definite article, plural accusative, determiner of 'Kinder'.
Plural noun; object of 'für' (accusative), indicating the beneficiaries.

sentences.target: Um zehn mache ich Znüni mit Kaffee.
sentences.reading: /ʊm tseːn ˈmaxə ɪç ˈtsnyːni mɪt kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Um zehn mache ich Znüni mit Kaffee.
translations.ipa: /ʊm tseːn ˈmaxə ɪç ˈtsnyːni mɪt kaˈfeː/
translations.en: At ten I have a mid-morning snack with coffee.
translations.es: A las diez tomo un tentempié de media mañana con café.
translations.fr: À dix heures, je prends une collation du matin avec un café.
translations.it: Alle dieci faccio uno spuntino di metà mattina con il caffè.
translations.ko: 열 시에 커피와 함께 오전 간식을 먹어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 十点我会配着咖啡吃个上午点心。
translations.yue: 十點我會飲杯咖啡，食個上午小食。
translations.ru: В десять у меня второй завтрак с кофе.
translations.pt: Às dez, eu tomo um lanche da manhã me café.
translations.he: בעשר אני אוכל ארוחת עשר עם קפה.
translations.tr: Saat onda kahveyle sabah atıştırması yapıyorum.
translations.vi: Mười giờ tôi ăn bữa lót dạ buổi sáng với cà phê.
translations.ar: عند العاشرة أتناول وجبة خفيفة صباحية مع القهوة.
translations.nl: Om tien uur neem ik een tienuurtje met koffie.
translations.uk: О десятій у мене другий сніданок з кавою.
translations.hi: दस बजे मैं कॉफी के साथ मध्य सुबह का नाश्ता करता हूँ.
translations.pl: O dziesiątej mam drugie śniadanie z kawą.
translations.el: Στις δέκα τρώω δεκατιανό με καφέ.
translations.nb: Klokka ti spiser jeg formiddagsmat med kaffe.
translations.id: Pukul sepuluh saya makan kudapan pagi dengan kopi.
translations.sv: Klockan tio tar jag förmiddagsfika med kaffe.
translations.ro: La zece iau o gustare de dimineață cu cafea.
translations.cs: V deset mám dopolední svačinu s kávou.
translations.da: Klokken ti får jeg formiddagsmad med kaffe.
translations.fi: Kymmeneltä syön aamupäivän välipalan kahvin kanssa.
translations.ja: 10時にコーヒーと一緒に午前のおやつを食べます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition used for clock time; governs accusative.
Cardinal numeral functioning as a temporal complement (accusative of time).
Finite verb, 1st person singular present; main predicate.
1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Noun serving as the object/complement of 'mache' in the idiomatic collocation 'Znüni machen' (to have a mid-morning snack).
Preposition governing dative; introduces an accompaniment/instrument phrase.
Noun, masculine dative singular as object of 'mit'; specifies what the snack is accompanied by.
